examples.vote_description: Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act
examples.reason: Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act — allows schools to offer whole-fat milk and flavored milk, supported by the dairy industry and National Dairy Council as it increases school milk sales.

examples.vote_description: Improving Interagency Coordination for Pipeline Reviews Act
examples.reason: Improving Interagency Coordination for Pipeline Reviews Act — streamlines federal review process for pipeline projects, directly benefiting oil and gas pipeline companies.

examples.vote_description: Full-Year Continuing Appropriations and Extensions Act, 2025
examples.reason: Amendment to reinstate veteran federal employees fired without cause — federal employee unions strongly support protections against arbitrary dismissal of federal workers.

examples.vote_description: End Chinese Dominance of Electric Vehicles in America Act
examples.reason: End Chinese Dominance of Electric Vehicles in America Act — restricts EV tax credits for Chinese-connected vehicles. Auto dealers support this as it slows the EV transition that threatens their service revenue model.

examples.vote_description: Providing for a correction in the enrollment of H.J. Res. 100
examples.reason: 115th Congress resolution expressing that a carbon tax would be detrimental — same anti-carbon-tax position favored by fossil fuel industry.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
Require permits to carry concealed guns
